title: Qlog QUIC Migration And Recovery Work Item
summary: Implement the qlog QUIC migration, key lifecycle, recovery, and congestion event contracts.
planned_changes: Add typed payload contracts for connection_id_updated, migration_state_updated, key_updated, key_discarded, recovery_parameters_set, recovery_metrics_updated, congestion_state_updated, and packet_lost. Keep the mapping boundary explicit so later QUIC runtime integration can emit these events without depending on writer internals.
out_of_scope: Core envelope and contained JSON writer work.
verification_plan: Run snapshot and contract tests for migration and recovery events and confirm the event contracts preserve draft-aware unknown-field behavior.
